---
title: "Decoy Filtering Analysis"
author: "Decoy Dataset Generation"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r load-libraries}
library(GenomicRanges)
library(rtracklayer)
```

```{r load-data}
# Load DecoySpliceSites_f50.bed file
# BED format: chr, start, end, name, score, strand, counts
decoy_bed <- read.table("../data/DecoySpliceSites_f50.bed",
    sep = "\t",
    header = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Set column names for BED file
colnames(decoy_bed) <- c("chr", "start", "end", "name", "score", "strand", "counts")

# Convert to 1-based coordinates
decoy_gr <- GRanges(
    seqnames = decoy_bed$chr,
    ranges = IRanges(start = decoy_bed$start + 1, end = decoy_bed$end),
    strand = decoy_bed$strand,
    name = decoy_bed$name,
    score = decoy_bed$score
)

cat("Loaded", length(decoy_gr), "decoy ID regions\n")

# Load GTF file and filter for exons only
gtf <- import("../reference/gencode.v49.annotation.gtf.gz", format = "gtf")

# Filter for exon features only
exon_gr <- gtf[gtf$type == "exon"]
```

### Exon Removal (Unstranded)

#### This section removes exon-overlapping loci in one unstranded step

```{r find-exon-overlaps-unstranded}
# Find exon overlaps ignoring strand
exon_overlaps <- findOverlaps(
    query = decoy_gr,
    subject = exon_gr,
    ignore.strand = TRUE
)

exon_overlap_df <- data.frame(
    decoy_name = decoy_gr[queryHits(exon_overlaps)]$name,
    decoy_chr = seqnames(decoy_gr[queryHits(exon_overlaps)]),
    decoy_start = start(decoy_gr[queryHits(exon_overlaps)]),
    decoy_end = end(decoy_gr[queryHits(exon_overlaps)]),
    decoy_strand = strand(decoy_gr[queryHits(exon_overlaps)]),
    decoy_score = decoy_gr[queryHits(exon_overlaps)]$score,
    exon_chr = seqnames(exon_gr[subjectHits(exon_overlaps)]),
    exon_start = start(exon_gr[subjectHits(exon_overlaps)]),
    exon_end = end(exon_gr[subjectHits(exon_overlaps)]),
    exon_strand = strand(exon_gr[subjectHits(exon_overlaps)]),
    gene_id = exon_gr[subjectHits(exon_overlaps)]$gene_id,
    gene_name = exon_gr[subjectHits(exon_overlaps)]$gene_name,
    transcript_id = exon_gr[subjectHits(exon_overlaps)]$transcript_id,
    exon_number = exon_gr[subjectHits(exon_overlaps)]$exon_number,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

exon_overlap_df$overlap_length <- pmin(exon_overlap_df$decoy_end, exon_overlap_df$exon_end) -
    pmax(exon_overlap_df$decoy_start, exon_overlap_df$exon_start) + 1
exon_overlap_df$strand_match <- exon_overlap_df$decoy_strand == exon_overlap_df$exon_strand

cat("  Total decoy rows:", length(decoy_gr), "\n")
cat("  Rows with exon overlaps:", length(unique(queryHits(exon_overlaps))), "\n")
cat("  Same strand:", sum(exon_overlap_df$strand_match), "\n")
cat("  Opposite strand:", sum(!exon_overlap_df$strand_match), "\n")
```

### Protein Coding Region Overlap Analysis

#### Keep only decoys in introns by filtering to keep only loci in 'protein-coding' regions

```{r remove-exon-overlaps}
overlapped_idx <- sort(unique(queryHits(exon_overlaps)))
no_unstranded_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(decoy_bed)), overlapped_idx)
no_unstranded_bed <- decoy_bed[no_unstranded_idx, ]

# Create GRanges object for no-unstranded-overlap BED rows
no_unstranded_gr <- GRanges(
    seqnames = no_unstranded_bed$chr,
    ranges = IRanges(start = no_unstranded_bed$start + 1, end = no_unstranded_bed$end),
    strand = no_unstranded_bed$strand,
    name = no_unstranded_bed$name,
    score = no_unstranded_bed$score
)

cat("Created GRanges object with", length(no_unstranded_gr), "no unstranded decoy ID regions\n")

# Filter GTF for protein coding regions
protein_coding_genes <- gtf[gtf$type == "gene" & gtf$gene_type == "protein_coding"]

cat("Found", length(protein_coding_genes), "protein coding genes\n")

# Also get all features (exons, transcripts, etc.) from protein coding genes
protein_coding_gene_ids <- unique(protein_coding_genes$gene_id)
protein_coding_features <- gtf[gtf$gene_id %in% protein_coding_gene_ids]
```

```{r find-overlaps-protein-coding}
# Find overlaps between no-unstranded BED rows and protein coding regions
overlaps_protein_coding <- findOverlaps(
    query = no_unstranded_gr,
    subject = protein_coding_features,
    ignore.strand = FALSE
)

cat("Found", length(overlaps_protein_coding), "overlapping pairs with protein coding regions\n")
```

```{r create-protein-coding-overlap-table}
# Create a data frame with overlap information
overlap_protein_coding_df <- data.frame(
    decoy_name = no_unstranded_gr[queryHits(overlaps_protein_coding)]$name,
    decoy_chr = seqnames(no_unstranded_gr[queryHits(overlaps_protein_coding)]),
    decoy_start = start(no_unstranded_gr[queryHits(overlaps_protein_coding)]),
    decoy_end = end(no_unstranded_gr[queryHits(overlaps_protein_coding)]),
    decoy_strand = strand(no_unstranded_gr[queryHits(overlaps_protein_coding)]),
    feature_type = protein_coding_features[subjectHits(overlaps_protein_coding)]$type,
    feature_chr = seqnames(protein_coding_features[subjectHits(overlaps_protein_coding)]),
    feature_start = start(protein_coding_features[subjectHits(overlaps_protein_coding)]),
    feature_end = end(protein_coding_features[subjectHits(overlaps_protein_coding)]),
    feature_strand = strand(protein_coding_features[subjectHits(overlaps_protein_coding)]),
    gene_id = protein_coding_features[subjectHits(overlaps_protein_coding)]$gene_id,
    gene_name = protein_coding_features[subjectHits(overlaps_protein_coding)]$gene_name,
    gene_type = protein_coding_features[subjectHits(overlaps_protein_coding)]$gene_type,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Calculate overlap length
overlap_protein_coding_df$overlap_length <- pmin(overlap_protein_coding_df$decoy_end, overlap_protein_coding_df$feature_end) -
    pmax(overlap_protein_coding_df$decoy_start, overlap_protein_coding_df$feature_start) + 1

cat("Created overlap table with", nrow(overlap_protein_coding_df), "rows\n")

# Summary statistics for protein coding overlaps
cat("  Total no unstranded decoy IDs:", length(no_unstranded_gr), "\n")
cat("  Decoy IDs overlapping protein coding regions:", length(unique(overlap_protein_coding_df$decoy_name)), "\n")
print(table(overlap_protein_coding_df$feature_type))

protein_coding_decoy_ids <- unique(overlap_protein_coding_df$decoy_name)

cat("Filtering BED data to keep only protein coding overlapping loci...\n")
cat("  Decoy IDs overlapping protein coding:", length(protein_coding_decoy_ids), "\n")
cat("  Original rows:", nrow(no_unstranded_bed), "\n")

decoy_protein_coding_bed <- no_unstranded_bed[no_unstranded_bed$name %in% protein_coding_decoy_ids, ]

cat("  Filtered rows:", nrow(decoy_protein_coding_bed), "\n")
cat("  Removed:", nrow(no_unstranded_bed) - nrow(decoy_protein_coding_bed), "\n")
```

```{r deduplicate-final-bed}
# Remove duplicates based on BED columns 1-4: chr, start, end, name
before_dedup <- nrow(decoy_protein_coding_bed)
decoy_protein_coding_bed <- decoy_protein_coding_bed[!duplicated(decoy_protein_coding_bed[, 1:4]), ]
after_dedup <- nrow(decoy_protein_coding_bed)

cat("Removed", before_dedup - after_dedup, "duplicate rows based on columns 1-4\n")
cat("Final rows after deduplication:", after_dedup, "\n")
```

```{r save-protein-coding-results}
# Save filtered BED rows
write.table(decoy_protein_coding_bed,
    file = "../data/DecoySpliceSites_proteincoding.bed",
    sep = "\t",
    quote = FALSE,
    row.names = FALSE,
    col.names = FALSE
)

cat("Filtered BED saved to ../data/DecoySpliceSites_proteincoding.bed\n")
cat("  Rows saved:", nrow(decoy_protein_coding_bed), "\n")
```
